_meta.description: NEXUS-6 auto-start hook config for Claude Code

description: NEXUS-6 auto-start hook for Claude Code settings.json
instruction: Add the 'hook' object below to ~/.claude/settings.json under 'hooks' to auto-ensure NEXUS-6 daemon is running on every tool use.
notes: The ensure script is idempotent and silent — safe to run on every tool call
Runs only on Bash tool use to avoid overhead on Read/Write/Grep calls
Auto-starts daemon if not running, exits immediately if already active
All state stored in ~/.nexus/ (PID file, logs, reports)
